action_set_definitions.name: query_system_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Searches environmental system logs to identify alert metadata. Used to find the station ID associated with specific signals in a designated corridor.

signal_type.description: The type of alert signal (e.g., 'Unauthorized Entry').

corridor_name.description: The specific area to search (e.g., 'Western Corridor').

action_set_definitions.name: get_equipment_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the physical location and status of hardware from the equipment registry using a unique ID.

equipment_id.description: The ID of the sensor or station (e.g., 'SNSR-992').

action_set_definitions.name: get_drone_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the current location, battery level, and health of a specific drone.

action_set_definitions.name: move_drone
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a drone to fly to a specified set of coordinates.

drone_id.description: The ID of the drone to move.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_visual_scan
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a visual survey of a specific target area using drone sensors. Range is limited by visibility conditions.

drone_id.description: The drone to use for the scan.

target_id.description: The ID of the animal/object to identify (e.g., 'R-102').

visibility_range_km.description: The maximum distance at which the camera can identify the target.

state_description.timestamp: The current ISO 8601 timestamp of the simulation.
state_description.weather: Environmental conditions affecting drone flight and camera observations.
state_description.drones: List of active monitoring drones, their coordinates, and remaining battery life.
state_description.tracked_individuals: The true positions and health status of endangered animals (hidden from Agent unless observed).
state_description.poacher_threat_level: Current threat assessment based on acoustic sensors (Low, Medium, High).
